title: Still There?
story: [Meridian-7 Log #005] The signal is fading. In the last batch of parseable data, you notice some lines end with ".signal" — this appears to be rEx's communication signature, like the closing of a human letter. If you can't finish parsing before the signal disappears entirely... hurry.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches lines ending with ".signal"
hints: [Hint] You're focused on the "end" of the line
[Hint] Regex has a symbol for "end of line"
promptHints: Tell the AI you want to match strings ending with a specific suffix
Clarify the suffix is ".signal" not just "signal"
Hint the AI to use an end-of-line anchor

feedback.onPass: [Signature Confirmed] Signal format locked. You've confirmed rEx's existence — now you need to learn its language.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Signature unrecognized. End-matching requires more precise rules.
feedback.onPerfect: [Perfect Closure] Chapter One complete. The signal is no longer noise — it's the beginning of a conversation.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual signature recognition. Chapter One, a perfect close.
